items.title: Follow up with SMBC (Ryo Ishii) on Opti alignment for AD management meeting
items.context: Email from ryo.ishii@smbcgroup.com on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key...' — Ryo wants to reconnect about Opti ahead of their internal meeting.

items.title: Follow up with Sai at Discern Security on outreach email
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital on May 18: 'Hi Sai, It was great meeting you a few weeks ago. I have been hearing great things about Discern from my friends in the security space at firms like Forgepoint, and I would love to...' — outreach sent 5 days ago, check if response received.

errors: Calendar queries failed for all deals (Graph API throttled 429) — no calendar events were scanned for to-do extraction.

Full email body reads failed (Graph API throttled 429) — extraction limited to search result snippets for emails within the 7-day window (Aembit, Blast Security, Discern Security, Opti). Some action items may have been missed due to truncated content.
Non-deal calendar scan (LP meetings, internal meetings) could not be performed due to calendar API throttling.
